---
title: "W4Tuesday"
author: "David Ludeke"
date: "10/12/2021"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F, message = F, warning = F)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tigris)
library(censusapi)

Sys.setenv(CENSUS_KEY="46c0518594422fc024772060dae78c2c2ffcc89d")
```

```{r} 
bay_income_race_2019 <- getCensus( # variable name: geography_topic(s)_date
  name = "acs/acs5", # could be acs1 for 1-year 
  vintage = 2019,
  region = "county:001,013,041,055,075,081,085,095,097",
  regionin = "state:06",
  vars = "group(B19001A)" # gets all variables under that table (income under 10,000, 11-15000, etc.)
) %>% 
  select(ends_with("E") & -c(state, NAME)) 

```


```{r}

```
